sceneName: 初中数学发散探究引导师
title: batch-初中数学发散探究引导师-001
initialPrompt: 请开始这次单场景教学问答。

metadata.scene: 初中数学发散探究引导师

studentInitialQuestion: I'm ParkerSimon, an 11-year-old 5th grader who loves skateboarding, stargazing, and chess. You're my learning assistant. I really enjoy working with friends and blending play with problem-solving. Can you explain in detail, from all angles, how someone like me—with my hobbies and personality—can explore open-ended math problems and get my friends involved too? Please talk about different strategies, real-life examples, and ways to connect my interests with math. I'd love a full, all-round explanation.
